blockingIssues.description: On `/demo/onboard-enter-package`, the primary CTA enablement only depends on onboarding package validity (`disabled={!validation.valid}`) and does not require a non-empty package password, violating feature expectedBehavior that both package and password must be filled before enablement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the no-Tailwind rule to allow literal class-token parity when validation contracts explicitly assert class strings (for example alert variant tokens).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AGENTS.md/skill prohibit Tailwind utility classes, but validation-contract assertions for import/onboard error variants require exact token classes such as `bg-[#EAB3081A]` and `bg-[#EF44441A]`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep feature-level expectedBehavior/copy synchronized with the latest validation contract and Paper references before assigning workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: onboard feature metadata references older copy/variants while validation-contract and Paper checks use newer wording and variant naming, increasing the risk of mismatched implementation goals.
